Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating to get the job done right.

“Our AC went out during a heatwave, and Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating came to the rescue! They were fast, professional, and fixed the problem quickly. The technician, Mike, explained everything clearly and didn't try to upsell us on anything. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. AC Repair
Jul 15, 2025

“We recently had a new furnace installed by Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating. The installation process was smooth and efficient. The team was respectful of our home and cleaned up after themselves. The new furnace is working great so far, and our house is much warmer this winter.”

John B. Furnace Installation
Feb 20, 2025

“I was experiencing allergy symptoms, and a friend recommended duct cleaning. Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating did an amazing job! The air in my house feels much cleaner, and my allergies have improved significantly. The technicians were thorough and professional.”

Emily K. Duct Cleaning
Oct 5, 2024

“We use Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating for our annual AC tune-up. They are always on time, courteous, and do a great job of keeping our system running smoothly. Their prices are fair, and we appreciate their honesty and reliability.”

David S. AC Tune-Up
May 10, 2025

“Our heat pump stopped working, and Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating was able to diagnose and repair the problem quickly. The technician was knowledgeable and explained the issue clearly. The repair was affordable, and we're happy to have our heat back!”

Lisa R. Heat Pump Repair
Dec 1, 2024

“Called at 2am and they actually answered! AC was fixed by 4am. Unbelievable service.”

Tom H. Emergency AC Repair
Aug 3, 2025
Virginia Beach Air Conditioning & Heating

Trusted hvac company professionals serving Virginia Beach, VA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
